complications.name: Reinforcement Arrival
complications.description: A second ship warps in on the enemy's flank at round 3.
complications.narration: A contact lights up the long-range scanner. One more ship just dropped out of warp. The fight just got bigger.

complications.name: Shield Harmonic Resonance
complications.description: Local field resonance interferes with shield regeneration for both sides.
complications.narration: Your shield emitters stutter against something in the local field. Regeneration is running at half. Same for them.

complications.name: Asteroid Field Closing
complications.description: The engagement drifted into a tightening asteroid cluster. Maneuvering room is vanishing.
complications.narration: The asteroid field is closing in. Your evasion window just got tighter. Fly straighter than you'd like to.

complications.name: Morale Shift
complications.description: Player hull under 30% — a dramatic beat where the captain's tone shifts.
complications.narration: Your hull's screaming. Whoever's on the other end of the comms just heard your ship shift. They know.

complications.name: Third-Party Hail
complications.description: At round 4, a neutral comm channel opens with someone watching the fight.
complications.narration: Comms open on a channel you didn't tune. Someone's watching. Not talking. Watching.

complications.name: Battle Damage
complications.description: Enemy hull under 50% — accuracy degrades as their fire control limps.
complications.narration: You see a plasma conduit rupture on their hull. Their next volleys will be less sure than the first.
